Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class EmbeddedServiceDetail

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.EmbeddedServiceDetail
public class EmbeddedServiceDetail extends SObject

Java class for EmbeddedServiceDetail complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmbeddedServiceDetail">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AvatarImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContrastInvertedColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContrastPrimaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CustomMinimizedComponent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CustomPrechatComponent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FieldServiceConfirmCardImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FieldServiceHomeImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FieldServiceLogoImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Font" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FontSize" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Height" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFieldServiceEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLiveAgentEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOfflineCaseEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPrechatEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsQueuePositionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NavBarColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NavBarTextColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OfflineCaseBackgroundImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PrechatBackgroundImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PrimaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SecondaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SecondaryNavBarColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldHideAuthDialog" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldShowExistingAppointment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldShowNewAppointment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Site" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SmallCompanyLogoImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WaitingStateBackgroundImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Width" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
